get.description: Retrieve batch cards with filtering, pagination and search capabilities

parameters.name: createdAt
parameters.description: Filter by creation date range (format: from,to) in ISO format

parameters.description: Filter by completion time range (format: from,to) in ISO format

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Filter by start time range (format: from,to) in ISO format

parameters.description: Filter by specific card ID within batches

parameters.description: Filter by failed cards count (format: min,max)

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: Filter by completed cards count (format: min,max)

parameters.description: Search term to filter by batchId or batchName

get.summary: Get a specific request-response pair by ID

from.description: Filter by creation date - from (Format: YYYY-MM-DD)

to.description: Filter by creation date - to (Format: YYYY-MM-DD)

city.description: City where the institution is located

state.description: State or province where the institution is located

country.description: Country where the institution is located

registrationCountry.description: Country where the institution is registered

address.description: Physical address details of the institution

institutionEmail.description: Official email address of the institution

institutionPhone.description: Official phone number of the institution

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL of the institution

firstName.description: First name of the institution admin

lastName.description: Last name of the institution admin

otherNames.description: Other names of the institution admin (if any)

adminEmail.description: Email address of the institution admin

adminPhone.description: Phone number of the institution admin

enabled.description: Whether this authentication method is enabled

role.description: Role type for the institution user

permissions.description: List of permissions associated with the role

password.description: User password - must be at least 8 characters

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary membership

count.description: Maximum number of transactions allowed per day

dailyLimit.description: Daily transaction limits for the channel

type.description: Type of API configuration (ISO or JSON)

institution.description: Institution ID that owns this card program

serviceCode.description: Service code for the card program

channels.description: Channel configurations for the card program

settlementConfig.description: Settlement configuration for the card program

startDate.description: Start date of the card program

endDate.description: End date of the card program

webHookConfig.description: API configuration for the card program

seqNumber.description: sequence number of the card program

mksmi.description: Master Key for Secure Messaging Integrity

mksmc.description: Master Key for Secure Messaging Confidentiality

code.description: Unique code identifier for the HSM

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary HSM

code.description: Unique code identifier for the HSM

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary HSM

isDeleted.description: Whether the key is marked as deleted

roles.description: Roles and permissions assigned to the user

trackingId.description: Tracking ID for the verification request

GrantType.description: The OAuth grant type for the application

name.description: The name of the OAuth application

description.description: A detailed description of the OAuth application and its purpose

publicKey.description: Public key used for secure communication

scopes.description: List of OAuth scopes requested by the application

grantType.description: The OAuth grant type for the application

redirectUri.description: List of allowed redirect URIs (required for authorization_code grant type)

grant_type.description: The OAuth 2.0 grant type being used

code.description: The authorization code received from the authorization server

refresh_token.description: The refresh token previously received from the authorization server

institutionId.description: The unique identifier of the institution

client_assertion_type.description: The type of assertion being made for client authentication

client_assertion.description: The assertion being used for client authentication (typically a JWT)

redirectUri.description: The URI to redirect to after authorization

publicKeyFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the public key used for encryption

oldPIN.description: Old PIN (encrypted) remove for pin reset

expiration.description: Card expiration date in YYYYMM format. Required for DAMAGED, EXPIRED, and RENEW reasons

enableDigitization.description: Enable or disable digitization for the card

cardIds.description: Array of card IDs to enroll in 2FA

role.description: The role assigned to the user

permissions.description: List of permissions associated with this role

phoneNumber.description: Phone number of the user (E.164 format)

roles.description: List of roles and their permissions. If not provided, default roles will be assigned.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method key (chip, magstripe, contactless, manual, ecom, moto)

lastFour.description: Last four digits of the card

pinEnabled.description: Whether PIN is enabled for the card

icvv.description: iCVV (integrated Circuit Card Verification Value, redacted)

response.description: Response from the card creation operation

encryptedValue.description: The encrypted value in base64 format
